content: Task 1: services/statmuse_recent_form.py (Bright Data + parser HTML stdlib + cross-validation)
Task 2: cablear StatMuse en mlb_recent_form_split.py (fallback + cross-check log warning)
Task 3: extraer F5 runs + first-inning runs desde /game/{pk}/linescore en paralelo con boxscore
Task 4: extender mlb_trend_interpreter.py con _detect_market_kind + evaluators F5/team_total/NRFI/YRFI
Task 5: 39 tests nuevos PASS (StatMuse parser, F5/NRFI evaluators, end-to-end routing)
Task 6: UI - chip de market_kind en TrendInterpretationBlock
